booking_confirmation_collector.label: Booking Confirmation Collector
booking_confirmation_collector.desc: Collects and tracks shipping booking confirmations from carriers

doc_deadline_guardian.label: Document Deadline Guardian
doc_deadline_guardian.desc: Monitors document submission deadlines and raises alerts when cutoffs approach

invoice_fetcher.label: Invoice Fetcher
invoice_fetcher.desc: Retrieves commercial invoices from producers and ERP systems

bl_tracker.label: B/L Tracker
bl_tracker.desc: Tracks bill of lading issuance and delivery status from carriers

invoice_validator.label: Invoice Validator
invoice_validator.desc: Validates invoice amounts, currency, and terms against the purchase order

phyto_validator.label: Phytosanitary Validator
phyto_validator.desc: Verifies phytosanitary certificates are properly signed and within validity period

weight_reconciler.label: Weight Reconciler
weight_reconciler.desc: Reconciles weight discrepancies between packing list, B/L, and purchase order

customs_check.label: Customs Check
customs_check.desc: Validates all documents required for customs clearance are in order

vessel_tracker.label: Vessel Tracker
vessel_tracker.desc: Tracks vessel position and port calls in real time

port_congestion_watcher.label: Port Congestion Watcher
port_congestion_watcher.desc: Monitors destination port congestion and adjusts ETA estimates

cutoff_sentinel.label: Cutoff Sentinel
cutoff_sentinel.desc: Watches cargo and documentation cutoffs and escalates approaching deadlines

eta_monitor.label: ETA Monitor
eta_monitor.desc: Tracks vessel ETA changes and notifies affected parties

export_workflow_orchestrator.label: Export Workflow Orchestrator
export_workflow_orchestrator.desc: Coordinates the end-to-end export workflow across agents and stakeholders

approval_router.label: Approval Router
approval_router.desc: Routes documents to the correct approvers based on lane and document type

document_assembler.label: Document Assembler
document_assembler.desc: Assembles the complete document package for submission to customs and banks

po_invoice_reconciler.label: PO–Invoice Reconciler
po_invoice_reconciler.desc: Reconciles purchase order values against received invoices

freight_cost_reconciler.label: Freight Cost Reconciler
freight_cost_reconciler.desc: Reconciles freight invoices against booked rates and surcharges

pre_cooling_tracker.label: Pre-Cooling Tracker
pre_cooling_tracker.desc: Monitors pre-cooling facility temperatures and confirms target pulp temp achieved

cold_storage_monitor.label: Cold Storage Monitor
cold_storage_monitor.desc: Continuously monitors reefer container temperature during cold storage

reefer_pti_validator.label: Reefer PTI Validator
reefer_pti_validator.desc: Verifies pre-trip inspection results before container is loaded

in_transit_telemetry_watcher.label: In-Transit Telemetry Watcher
in_transit_telemetry_watcher.desc: Monitors logger telemetry during transit and flags temperature excursions

cold_treatment_auditor.label: Cold Treatment Auditor
cold_treatment_auditor.desc: Audits cold treatment protocol compliance day by day against USDA/GACC requirements

arrival_cold_chain_coordinator.label: Arrival Cold Chain Coordinator
arrival_cold_chain_coordinator.desc: Coordinates reefer handover at destination port to maintain cold chain integrity

lc_discrepancy_catcher.label: L/C Discrepancy Catcher
lc_discrepancy_catcher.desc: Detects discrepancies between document set and letter of credit terms

lunar_new_year_window_watcher.label: Lunar New Year Window Watcher
lunar_new_year_window_watcher.desc: Flags delivery windows that overlap Chinese Lunar New Year port and bank closures

validations.weightDiscrepancy: Weight discrepancy between packing list and B/L
validations.originCertOk: Certificate of origin signed by SAG
validations.caGasWatch: CA gas mix near lower bound — monitoring
validations.lunarNewYearWindow: Delivery window overlaps Lunar New Year

alerts.dusMissingBody: 18 hours remaining to customs document cutoff
alerts.excursionResolvedBody: Top logger reached +0.4°C for 18 min — within tolerance
